'''âh-ng-h''' ('''kahangah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cail|cail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cail|cail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-ng-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahangah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihangah|thihangah]] || [[word:jihangah|jihangah]] || [[word:shihangah|shihangah]] || [[word:kihangah|kihangah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhangah|thuthuhangah]] || [[word:jujuhangah|jujuhangah]] || [[word:shushuhangah|shushuhangah]] || [[word:kukuhangah|kukuhangah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhangah|thuhangah]] || [[word:juhangah|juhangah]] || [[word:shuhangah|shuhangah]] || [[word:kuhangah|kuhangah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhangah|thuhangah]] || [[word:juhangah|juhangah]] || [[word:shuhangah|shuhangah]] || [[word:kuhangah|kuhangah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehangah|thehangah]] || [[word:jehangah|jehangah]] || [[word:shehangah|shehangah]] || [[word:kehangah|kehangah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohangah|thothohangah]] || [[word:jojohangah|jojohangah]] || [[word:shoshohangah|shoshohangah]] || [[word:kokohangah|kokohangah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohangah|thohangah]] || [[word:johangah|johangah]] || [[word:shohangah|shohangah]] || [[word:kohangah|kohangah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohangah|thohangah]] || [[word:johangah|johangah]] || [[word:shohangah|shohangah]] || [[word:kohangah|kohangah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhangah|thĂŠhangah]] || [[word:jĂŠhangah|jĂŠhangah]] || [[word:shĂŠhangah|shĂŠhangah]] || [[word:kĂŠhangah|kĂŠhangah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahangah|thathahangah]] || [[word:jajahangah|jajahangah]] || [[word:shashahangah|shashahangah]] || [[word:kakahangah|kakahangah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahangah|thahangah]] || [[word:jahangah|jahangah]] || [[word:shahangah|shahangah]] || [[word:kahangah|kahangah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahangah|thahangah]] || [[word:jahangah|jahangah]] || [[word:shahangah|shahangah]] || [[word:kahangah|kahangah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahangah|shahangah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahangah|goshahangah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahangah|gokishahangah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahangahnĂŒ|shahangahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahangahnknĂŒ|goshahangahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangahnĂŒ|gokishahangahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahangahshĂ«|shahangahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahangahnkshĂ«|goshahangahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahangahshĂ«|gokishahangahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangahro|shahangahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangahnkro|goshahangahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangahro|gokishahangahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangahmu|shahangahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangahnkmu|goshahangahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangahmu|gokishahangahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahangahsher|shahangahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahangahnksher|goshahangahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahangahsher|gokishahangahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahangahng|shahangahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahangahnkng|goshahangahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahangahng|gokishahangahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahangahya|shahangahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahangahnkya|goshahangahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahangahya|gokishahangahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahangahyam|shahangahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahangahnkyam|goshahangahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahangahyam|gokishahangahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangahnĂŒshĂ«|shahangahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahangahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahangahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangahnĂŒro|shahangahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangahnknĂŒro|goshahangahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangahnĂŒro|gokishahangahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangahnĂŒmu|shahangahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangahnknĂŒmu|goshahangahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangahnĂŒmu|gokishahangahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangahshĂ«nĂŒ|shahangahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahangahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahangahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangahshĂ«ro|shahangahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangahnkshĂ«ro|goshahangahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangahshĂ«ro|gokishahangahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangahshĂ«mu|shahangahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangahnkshĂ«mu|goshahangahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangahshĂ«mu|gokishahangahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangahronĂŒ|shahangahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangahnkronĂŒ|goshahangahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangahronĂŒ|gokishahangahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangahroshĂ«|shahangahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangahnkroshĂ«|goshahangahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangahroshĂ«|gokishahangahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangahromu|shahangahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangahnkromu|goshahangahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangahromu|gokishahangahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangahmunĂŒ|shahangahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangahnkmunĂŒ|goshahangahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangahmunĂŒ|gokishahangahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangahmushĂ«|shahangahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangahnkmushĂ«|goshahangahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangahmushĂ«|gokishahangahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangahmuro|shahangahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangahnkmuro|goshahangahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangahmuro|gokishahangahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
